name: 99.co
description: Operator of an online property listing marketplace intended for sale and rent. The company's platform offers a map-based property search engine that uses algorithms, enabling customers to find houses, condominiums, and apartments for sale and rental purposes.

name: 9FIN
description: Developer of a data analytics platform designed to provide AI-powered financial data. The company's platform uses computer vision and machine learning to find key data on high-yield bonds and the companies who issue them along with up-to-date tracking and monitoring of deals, real-time market news and events, and price data on bonds displayed as charts for the fixed-income market, enabling income professionals to save time and make proper investment decisions.

name: Ahlijasa
description: Provider of an on-demand platform designed to offer laundry services. The company's platform simplifies the process of finding the right service professional for all personal and household needs, enabling consumers to hire household assistance through a mobile application.

name: Avidbots
description: Developer of autonomous robotics systems designed to automate commercial floor cleaning. The company's systems cooperate to clean department stores, auto dealerships, education facilities, airports, and other commercial cleaning spaces and thus automates the most labor and time-intensive part of commercial cleaning, enabling the cleaning crew to focus on higher-value cleaning tasks and leaving repetitive and tedious floor scrubbing to robots.

name: Baania
description: Operator of a real estate information platform intended to offer a database of real estate listings to customers. The company's platform uses information about projects, houses and various house designs to find and compare properties in Thailand with the option of seeing their historical prices, enabling buyers to calculate interest on properties and make informed decisions about them before buying.

name: Barn & Willow
description: Operator of a home decor platform intended to offer custom window draperies and all types of textile products. The company's brand offers a wide selection of custom draperies from a wide range of fabrics, styles, and dimensions that can be custom stitched to the exact dimension and style specifications, enabling customers to purchase home drapery products according to their choice of color, fabric, and dimension.

name: Behja
description: Developer of a real estate platform intended for those who want to rent a home with the option to eventually buy it. The company's platform allows one to choose any property available for sale on the market with transparency and reliability in the contractual agreements between landlords and tenants and handles everything from managing utility bills to seamless rental payments, enabling aspiring homeowners with a more flexible and convenient path.

name: BluAge
description: Developer of an online real estate platform designed to help customers search for a property using the Internet. The company's platform matches agents with customers, enabling buyers to interact with agencies and get access to the property rapidly and cost-effectively.

name: Butlr Technologies
description: Developer of a sensor trajectory platform intended to provide a seamless automated smart building experience. The company's platform includes features such as remote monitoring of senior living, activity monitoring to capture user behavior, recording foot traffic, curating heat maps and zone counting in any space, enabling commercial real estate owners and businesses, enabling users to make data-driven decisions using artificial intelligence and real-time behavior analytics.

name: Call Levels
description: Developer of a mobile-based application designed to be used for financial assets tracking. The company's application offers a proprietary, reliable asset monitoring system that alarms about price changes through its automatic notification feature and price monitoring technology, enabling financial institutions and investors to track and set an alert for the financial market stocks, commodities, and indices.

name: Compstak
description: Developer of a real estate data platform designed to provide timely, analyst-reviewed commercial lease, sales, and property details. The company's platform gathers and quality checks lease and sales contracts from professionals, enabling lenders, landlords, and investors to close business by focusing on meaningful networking and accurate analyses.

name: EquityZen
description: Developer of an investment marketplace designed to connect shareholders of private companies seeking liquidity with accredited investors seeking private market access. The company's marketplace makes buying and selling shares in private companies easy, enabling clients to have the opportunity to invest in large private firms and address liquidity and risk concerns.

name: Ethic
description: Developer of a data-driven technology platform designed to offer simplified financial planning services and portfolios. The company's platform leverages investment consulting technology that creates sustainable portfolios that are optimized to reduce tracking error to the underlying passive index against well-established benchmarks, enabling family offices, health advisers, and endowment foundations to provide customized sustainability insights and optimized passive portfolio construction for their clients.

name: Finnomena
description: Developer of an investment and portfolio management application designed to help users invest and manage financial goals. The company's application recommends an automated portfolio of stocks based on the risk that investors choose, along with tracking down their investment situations and adjusting their investment plans to their needs, enabling financial investors to research, analyze data and receive real-time analysis of market and funds.

name: Fintor
description: Operator of a fractional real estate investing platform intended to offer a simpler, smarter, and more reliable way to invest money. The company's software allows individual real estate investors or bigger real estate development firms to list their properties and give people the opportunity to buy shares, enabling investors to invest in the real estate markets.

name: Fortu
description: Provider of digital private banking services intended to design a borderless, private and personal finance remedy. The company provides financing options for high-net-worth individuals and businesses requiring secure, reliable and international financial reach by offering multicurrency payment accounts with easy access to financial services, enabling HNIs and customers to enjoy financial freedom and gain complete control over their finances.

name: Getagent
description: Developer of real estate platform designed to compare estate agent prices. The company's platform compares the performance and fees of properties and offers guidance regarding the track record of online agents, mortgages, mortgage contact, and property selling, enabling homeowners to find local agents to sell their property.

name: Go Rise
description: Developer of a wealth management platform intended to solve the financial problems of migrants. The company offers banking and financial services to low-income, unbanked, and underbanked migrant workers in the United Arab Emirates, enabling users to manage their finances, learn new skills, and build a better future.

name: GreenWay Labs
description: Owner and developer of non-toxic, eco-friendly cleaning products intended to create a cleaning formula that would meet the green standards. The company's products utilize advanced colloidal chemistry featuring renewable plant-based components to develop a non-toxic, non-solvent-based cleaning solution that can remove oils, greases, including asphalt roofing tars and sealants, enabling users to get a product that is safe for skin and all surfaces at a low cost.

name: Guideline
description: Developer of an automated investment technology designed to revolutionize online retirement planning. The company's technology incorporates a participant's financial ecosystem, making recommendations and adjustments on an ongoing basis, enabling users to optimize their retirement potential plan and save for the future.

name: HappyCo
description: Developer of a property inspection platform designed to inspect, monitor, and analyze the performance of real estate assets. The company's platform allows for undertaking mobile inspections, work order management, and remote monitoring and is used for inspecting residential real estate, commercial buildings, cruise ships, ski resorts, food, and fire safety, enabling apartment operators to have real-time visibility and control of operations.

name: Havenly
description: Provider of interior designing services intended to offer a guide to decorating homes. The company offers a platform that assists to select a designer, personalizing the design, collaborating on ideas, visualizing the room, chatting with a professional for further advice, and making the purchase, enabling people to have a cost-effective way to redesign their homes.

name: Hedgeye
description: Operator of an investment research and financial media company intended to offer hedge fund quality research for everyday investors. The company's services include fundamental and industry-specific research, customized research, macro morning calls, company and industry-specific real-time updates, conference calls, corporate access, field trips and virtual portfolio management, enabling clients to get investment ideas through quantitative, bottom-up, and macro analysis with an emphasis on timing.

name: Hello Gold
description: Developer of a shariah-compliant mobile application designed to change the way users buy, save, sell, and redeem physical gold. The company's platform allows users to purchase and store gold online or take physical possession of the gold which can be sold at the prevailing exchange rates, enabling users to take a step toward lifelong financial security.

name: HiGuest
description: Developer of property management software designed to make short-term rentals easy. The company's software covers short-term rental portals and allows house owners to register on its platform and discover various properties to rent a house for a short period of time, enabling families to receive quality property management services for short-term rentals.

name: HODL Media
description: Developer of a crypto market data application designed to track cryptocurrency prices and charts from all exchanges. The company's application offers real-time charts, prices, and information from all global exchanges along with filtered tweets and headlines from news sources, enabling users to have clarity about the cryptocurrency scenario in the financial market.

name: HomeLight
description: Operator of an online real estate marketplace intended to make real estate transactions simple, certain, and satisfying for all. The company's platform delivers outcomes to homebuyers and sellers during every step of the real estate journey such as helping an all-cash offer, unlocking liquidity of their existing home to buy a new one, or creating certainty through a modern closing process, enabling customers to buy or sell their properties.

name: Houst
description: Developer of a homestay management platform designed to make listing a hassle-free process. The company's platform automates substantial parts of the property letting, price optimizations, marketing, and management aspects of guest bookings made on notable travel websites, enabling homeowners to achieve the optimal blend of rental yield and stress-free customer service by making more money.

name: Hubble

The company's marketplace helps businesses rent, manage and share office space, enabling clients to search, curate, and rent office spaces in London, helping them find the right balance of office and remote working, so their teams can thrive.

name: Infraspeak
description: Developer of a facility management platform designed to bring entire operations together with intelligent maintenance. The company's platform automates recurring tasks, makes everything work together, and reduces bureaucracy, risks, and costs with the help of innovative technologies, APIs, applications, and sensors to transform all data into actionable insights and suggestions, enabling facilities owners, managers, and service providers to manage facilities significantly with less stress, paper, and costs.

name: Keyo
description: Developer of biometric identification software designed to unlock access and make in-store payments through encrypted contactless palm scanning. The company's patented hardware and software map the unique patterns of the palm and encrypt data at enrollment with the power to open doors, pay at stores, redeem tickets, and more without phones, cards, or keys, enabling people to enjoy and experience convenience of biometrics without compromising privacy and providing customers.

name: Khmer Home

name: ShiftSouth

name: TapHomes

name: Myhero

name: VaultDragon

name: VTS

name: Worq
description: Provider of space-as-a-service designed for companies of all sizes from fast-growing startups to multinational corporations. The company's platform uses property management tools, enabling tenants to pay their rent online, at any time and anywhere via SMS and email in less than 60 seconds.

name: Homeday
description: Developer of an online platform designed to be used for data-driven pairing in the real estate sector. The company's online platform provides an application for buying and selling properties, enabling real estate agents to pair with private property owners to sell their property.

name: Navut
description: Provider of an online search platform intended to bridge the gap between home discovery and financing. description: Operator of a property search portal designed to find desirable properties in a hassle-free manner. description: Operator of a real estate property search website designed to find houses for sale in the United States. name: CYBAVO

name: Hipflat
description: Provider of a real estate search platform designed to help people find the right home. The company's online real estate portal uses a smart automated system for collection, extraction and processing of real estate pricing data from hundreds of unstructured sources, which includes asking prices for over 2,500 projects going back as far as eight years, achievable rental yields and pricing trends, all at no cost to buyers, enabling property buyers and renters to do their research and make an informed decision about property purchases or sales.

name: NinjaBlocks
description: Developer of cloud-enabled, environment-sensing computers. The company's open-source, home-automation system allows users to connect a variety of sensors to the Internet.

name: Smith
description: Developer of a home improvement mobile application intended to connect homeowners with professionals to get their home projects completed. The company's application offers to search for contractors and compare estimates for home improvements, remodeling and repairs, enabling users to message individual contractors and transform their living space in a hassle free way.

name: HostTonight
description: Provider of Airbnb management platform intended to manage short term rentals and Airbnb listings. The company's platform offers key exchange and check-in, welcome kits and cleaning services, improves response rate and help guests and give them tips and recommendations, offers listing optimization services to help guests manage their expectations when they book listing, enabling users to give their guests the possible experience and manage everything while wasting time.

name: Circle for Programming Electronic Applications
description: Developer of a property management software designed for real estate managers to save time. The company's software offers control over tenants' requests and enhances their living experience, lead a team with a productive flow, better manage the resources and cut the operational cost, manage all salesforce appointments with flexible calendar displays and layouts, enabling property managers to engage with their clients in an efficient manner, handle their requests effectively and reduce the overall operational costs.

name: Sentieo
description: Provider of a financial data platform intended to facilitate research on equity and investment portfolios for making investment decisions. The company's platform tracks financial documents including SEC filings and global filings, organizes equity research process, shares financial information and documents with colleagues, generates financial reports on hedge funds, mutual funds and family offices, enabling analysts and investors to surf across financial databases and predict future investment trends.

name: Silvernest
description: Provider of an online roommate-matching platform designed for homeowners to rent out a room or portion of their home. The company's proprietary matching tool pairs boomers, retirees, empty nesters and other aging adults with compatible long-term housemates, enabling them to earn extra income, establish new social connections and the ability to stay in the home as the years go on.

name: VivaReal
description: Provider of an online real estate marketplace designed to help thousands of people to find their dream house. The company's online real estate marketplace connects buyers, sellers and renters with the properties they are interested in, enabling them to avail profitable real estate deals.

name: Storefront
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to help people to rent short term retail space. The company's marketplace connects retailers, brands and designers with their customers through short-term retail stores, also known as pop-up shops, as well as helps realtors and space owners to list their property on the site and name their price and approve all bookings, enabling clients to benefit from each other and grow in terms of revenue.

name: Eventup
description: Developer of an online cross-city event venue searching platform designed to connect property owners and clients directly. The company's online platform offers an online marketplace for thousands of event venues across the U.S. including galleries, lofts, warehouses, banquet halls, rooftop bars and conference centers, enabling restaurants and other venues operators to streamline their event sales and management workflow, from initial inquiry through day-of execution, simplifying event planning for venues and their customers.
